ResizeEipGroupBandwidth.id: The ID of the shared bandwidth package
ResizeEipGroupBandwidth.clientToken: Idempotent token, see [clientToken](EIP/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
ResizeEipGroupBandwidth.bandwidthInMbps: Public network bandwidth in Mbps. For prepay type EIP Group, the value must be an integer between 10 and 200
